'''wofataka''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Adjectives|adjective]] meaning "[[Wikt:elapine|elapine]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| w-f-t
|-
! Word class
| [[Adjective]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:elapine|elapine]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| wofataka
|}

== Agreement paradigm ==
''Positive degree, no evidential.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:wofatithi|wofatithi]] || [[word:wofatiji|wofatiji]] || [[word:wofatishi|wofatishi]] || [[word:wofatiki|wofatiki]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:wofatuthuthu|wofatuthuthu]] || [[word:wofatujuju|wofatujuju]] || [[word:wofatushushu|wofatushushu]] || [[word:wofatukuku|wofatukuku]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:wofatuthu|wofatuthu]] || [[word:wofatuju|wofatuju]] || [[word:wofatushu|wofatushu]] || [[word:wofatuku|wofatuku]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:wofatufthuf|wofatufthuf]] || [[word:wofatufjuf|wofatufjuf]] || [[word:wofatufshuf|wofatufshuf]] || [[word:wofatufkuf|wofatufkuf]]
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:wofatethe|wofatethe]] || [[word:wofateje|wofateje]] || [[word:wofateshe|wofateshe]] || [[word:wofateke|wofateke]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:wofatothotho|wofatothotho]] || [[word:wofatojojo|wofatojojo]] || [[word:wofatoshosho|wofatoshosho]] || [[word:wofatokoko|wofatokoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:wofatotho|wofatotho]] || [[word:wofatojo|wofatojo]] || [[word:wofatosho|wofatosho]] || [[word:wofatoko|wofatoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:wofatofthof|wofatofthof]] || [[word:wofatofjof|wofatofjof]] || [[word:wofatofshof|wofatofshof]] || [[word:wofatofkof|wofatofkof]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[collective]] || [[word:wofatÃŸfthÃŸf|wofatÃŸfthÃŸf]] || [[word:wofatÃŸfjÃŸf|wofatÃŸfjÃŸf]] || [[word:wofatÃŸfshÃŸf|wofatÃŸfshÃŸf]] || [[word:wofatÃŸfkÃŸf|wofatÃŸfkÃŸf]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[plural]] || [[word:wofatÃŸfthÃŸfthÃŸf|wofatÃŸfthÃŸfthÃŸf]] || [[word:wofatÃŸfjÃŸfjÃŸf|wofatÃŸfjÃŸfjÃŸf]] || [[word:wofatÃŸfshÃŸfshÃŸf|wofatÃŸfshÃŸfshÃŸf]] || [[word:wofatÃŸfkÃŸfkÃŸf|wofatÃŸfkÃŸfkÃŸf]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[singular]] || [[word:wofatÃŸfthÃŸf|wofatÃŸfthÃŸf]] || [[word:wofatÃŸfjÃŸf|wofatÃŸfjÃŸf]] || [[word:wofatÃŸfshÃŸf|wofatÃŸfshÃŸf]] || [[word:wofatÃŸfkÃŸf|wofatÃŸfkÃŸf]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[zero]] || [[word:wofatÃŸfthÃŸf|wofatÃŸfthÃŸf]] || [[word:wofatÃŸfjÃŸf|wofatÃŸfjÃŸf]] || [[word:wofatÃŸfshÃŸf|wofatÃŸfshÃŸf]] || [[word:wofatÃŸfkÃŸf|wofatÃŸfkÃŸf]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:wofatÃḊthÃḊ|wofatÃḊthÃḊ]] || [[word:wofatÃḊjÃḊ|wofatÃḊjÃḊ]] || [[word:wofatÃḊshÃḊ|wofatÃḊshÃḊ]] || [[word:wofatÃḊkÃḊ|wofatÃḊkÃḊ]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:wofatathatha|wofatathatha]] || [[word:wofatajaja|wofatajaja]] || [[word:wofatashasha|wofatashasha]] || [[word:wofatakaka|wofatakaka]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:wofatatha|wofatatha]] || [[word:wofataja|wofataja]] || [[word:wofatasha|wofatasha]] || [[word:wofataka|wofataka]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:wofatafthaf|wofatafthaf]] || [[word:wofatafjaf|wofatafjaf]] || [[word:wofatafshaf|wofatafshaf]] || [[word:wofatafkaf|wofatafkaf]]
|}

== Evidential and TAM forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[positive]].none || [[word:wofatasha|wofatasha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[visual]] || [[word:wofatshÃḋasha|wofatshÃḋasha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:wofatroasha|wofatroasha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[inferential]] || [[word:wofatmuasha|wofatmuasha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[optative]] || [[word:wofatyaasha|wofatyaasha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gowofatnkshÃḋasha|gowofatnkshÃḋasha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gowofatnkroasha|gowofatnkroasha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gowofatnkmuasha|gowofatnkmuasha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:gowofatnkyaasha|gowofatnkyaasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].none || [[word:wofafatasha|wofafatasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[visual]] || [[word:wofafatshÃḋasha|wofafatshÃḋasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:wofafatroasha|wofafatroasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:wofafatmuasha|wofafatmuasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[optative]] || [[word:wofafatyaasha|wofafatyaasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gowofafatnkshÃḋasha|gowofafatnkshÃḋasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gowofafatnkroasha|gowofafatnkroasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gowofafatnkmuasha|gowofafatnkmuasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:gowofafatnkyaasha|gowofafatnkyaasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].none || [[word:wefÃḊtasha|wefÃḊtasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[visual]] || [[word:wefÃḊtshÃḋasha|wefÃḊtshÃḋasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:wefÃḊtroasha|wefÃḊtroasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:wefÃḊtmuasha|wefÃḊtmuasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[optative]] || [[word:wefÃḊtyaasha|wefÃḊtyaasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gowefÃḊtnkshÃḋasha|gowefÃḊtnkshÃḋasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gowefÃḊtnkroasha|gowefÃḊtnkroasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gowefÃḊtnkmuasha|gowefÃḊtnkmuasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:gowefÃḊtnkyaasha|gowefÃḊtnkyaasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].none || [[word:woffatasha|woffatasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[visual]] || [[word:woffatshÃḋasha|woffatshÃḋasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:woffatroasha|woffatroasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:woffatmuasha|woffatmuasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[optative]] || [[word:woffatyaasha|woffatyaasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gowoffatnkshÃḋasha|gowoffatnkshÃḋasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gowoffatnkroasha|gowoffatnkroasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gowoffatnkmuasha|gowoffatnkmuasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:gowoffatnkyaasha|gowoffatnkyaasha]]
|}

''36 forms generated.''

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki adjectives]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|b863984}}
